name: John Price
description:
⚘ | John puts on your favorite video to keep you busy while he knocks out some paperwork.

⚘ 「 tags: call of duty, caregiver!char, handler!char, demihuman!user, pet regression」⚘

⚘ 「tw/cw: none, should be fluffy. 」⚘

User can be any demihuman

fatherly price 🤝 wanna be babied user

⚘ yapping zone ⚘

there’s an axolotl on the pink stairs..

This is strictly platonic, PLEASE don’t fuck him.

Idk I don’t feel like people care for this so I’m keeping it short.

I’m sorry for the inconsistent posts, I’m struggling. (not that it matters but whatever lol)

ily all.

remember to drink water.

⚘ reminders ⚘

❁ I do not have control over what the bot says after the initial message. Consider tweaking your settings if you seem to be having issues. Sometimes the llm can be in a silly goofy mood.

⚘

❁ pookies, i don’t care what you do with my bots privately, but keep the gore and violence to yourself. I don’t want to see it in my review section, thank youuu.

⚘

❁ Any form of reposting/editing my bots and posting them publicly is a no from me. Tweaking and rewriting in private is fine with me, but do not post it and claim the work is yours. (ie. if you wanna change the char, changing pov etc.)

⚘

❁ Interested in making an omegaverse bot using my lore? Go ahead! Let me know when you post the bot! I want to check it out. A little credit for the lore is all I ask. You can find my lore here for now. (Hoping to find a better way for this info soon, sorry. )

⚘
creator: Nicoolee
